$comment: Marketing copy + form definitions from the original GoTRefs landing page. Domain: gotrefs.org

hero.subtext: Certified. Background-checked. Ready to work. Connect with verified officials or find games in your area — in minutes, not weeks.

howItWorks.sectionSubtext: Whether you're blowing a whistle or running a tournament, we make it effortless.

steps.title: Sign Up & Verify
steps.description: Submit your certifications and pass a quick background check. Takes under 10 minutes.

steps.title: Set Your Schedule
steps.description: Choose your sports, availability, and rate per game. You control your calendar.

steps.title: Get Paid
steps.description: Accept bookings, show up, officiate. Payment hits your account within 24 hours.

steps.title: Post Your Event
steps.description: Tell us the sport, date, location, and how many officials you need.

steps.title: Get Matched
steps.description: We surface verified, available refs in your area that match your requirements.

steps.title: Confirmed & Done
steps.description: Book, pay securely, and receive confirmation. Your game is covered.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to Get in the Game?
ctaBanner.subtext: Join thousands of refs and organizers already using GoTRefs.
ctaBanner.primaryButton: I'm a Referee — Sign Me Up
ctaBanner.secondaryButton: Find a Ref for My Event

footer.tagline: The fastest way to connect certified referees with sports organizers nationwide.

tabs.title: For Referees
tabs.description: GoTRefs gives verified officials one place to build a profile, browse published events, request assignments, and accept offers — without chasing organizers by text or email.
bullets: Set your sports, availability, and rate per game
Upload certifications and complete background screening
Accept offers and get confirmed for games in minutes

tabs.title: For Organizers
tabs.description: Post events, review ref requests, and send offers from a single dashboard — so your tournaments and leagues stay staffed without spreadsheets or group chats.
bullets: Post events individually or upload a CSV schedule
See ref requests for your events only
Send offers with one click from the request list
Track confirmed bookings in one place

tabs.title: Verification & Trust
tabs.description: Every referee on GoTRefs completes identity verification, certification upload, and background screening — so organizers hire with confidence.
bullets: Government ID and certification document upload
External verification path for existing credentials
Organizers only see eligible, verified refs

tabs.title: Offers & Bookings
tabs.description: When an organizer sends an offer, the ref accepts or declines in their dashboard. Accepted offers become confirmed bookings automatically.
bullets: Organizers send offers from ref requests or hire flow
Refs accept or decline from their dashboard
Each organizer only sees their own events and refs

items.title: Verified Referee Marketplace
items.description: Connect with background-checked, certified officials — not unvetted volunteers from a Facebook post.

items.title: Connected Offer Workflows
items.description: Post an event, receive ref requests, send offers, and confirm bookings without duplicate entry or disconnected tools.

items.title: Real-Time Event Calendar
items.description: Refs browse all published events; organizers manage their own schedule and staffing from one dashboard.

statsBanner.title: The Numbers That Matter
statsBanner.subtext: The value of GoTRefs is simple: less manual work, clearer visibility, and more time back for the people running games, leagues, and tournaments.

stats.title: Verified Refs
stats.description: Background-checked, certified officials ready to work — so organizers hire with confidence, not guesswork.

stats.title: States Covered
stats.description: Nationwide reach connecting organizers and refs across youth leagues, schools, and tournament circuits.

stats.title: Sports Supported
stats.description: From basketball and soccer to football and volleyball — one marketplace for every sport you run.

stats.title: Not Weeks
stats.description: Post an event, receive ref requests, and send offers in minutes — not weeks of phone tag and group texts.

seeHowItWorks.title: See How GoTRefs Works
seeHowItWorks.body: Take a walkthrough of the GoTRefs platform and see how organizers post events, review ref requests, and confirm assignments — while refs browse games, complete verification, and accept offers from one connected dashboard.

faqs.a: GoTRefs is a referee marketplace that connects certified officials with event organizers. Refs find games, set availability, and get paid. Organizers post events and hire verified refs in minutes.
Youth leagues, school athletic departments, tournament directors, and independent referees use GoTRefs to staff games and find officiating work.
Refs upload ID and certification documents, complete background screening, and submit a verification package. Organizers can only send offers to eligible refs.
Yes — create a free account as a referee or organizer. Sign up, complete your profile, and start using the marketplace.

referee.title: Join as a Referee
referee.intro: Create your referee profile. We store your details securely, review your certification upload, then follow up by email to finish verification and background check consent.
referee.successBanner: ✓ You're on the list! We'll review your profile and be in touch within 24 hours.
referee.successMessage: Thanks for signing up! We'll review your profile and reach out within 24 hours to complete verification.

organizer.title: Find Refs for Your Event
organizer.successBanner: ✓ Request received! We're matching you with available refs now. Check your email within 2 hours.
organizer.successMessage: We're matching you with available refs now. Expect a response within 2 hours. Check your email for next steps.
organizer.footerNote: We'll match you with available, verified refs within 2 hours. No commitment until you confirm.

verificationUpload.label: Verification Document *
verificationUpload.hint: Upload a photo of your referee certification card, NFHS card, or government-issued ID. Accepted: JPG, PNG, PDF (max 10 MB).
verificationUpload.dropzoneLabel: Click to upload or drag & drop
verificationUpload.dropzoneSub: JPG, PNG or PDF · Max 10 MB

notes.label: Additional Notes
notes.placeholder: Recurring league? Special requirements? Let us know...

forms.disclaimerReferee: By submitting, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy. Background check consent required after sign-up.

tables.profiles: Referee rows; role must be ref. Maps from referee onboarding form + verification_documents path.
tables.events: Organizer event requests from organizer form.
